About

The runner
behind the miles.

I'm Ankan Patra, a distance runner from Kolkata, West Bengal. What started as a fitness goal became a full commitment to race mornings, finish lines, and personal bests.

🎯
First Race — UEM Run For A Cause 10K
Stepped onto a starting line for the first time. The beginning of everything.
🏙️
Tata Steel World 25K Kolkata — Dec 2025
Ran the iconic city course on its 10th anniversary. Bib #26182.
🏆
10K PB — 48:53, Kolkata Marathon · Feb 2026
Personal best set at the Kolkata Full Marathon 10K category. Pace: 4:53/km.
🔭
Next Goal — Sub 45:00 & First Half Marathon
Training to break the 45-minute barrier and conquer 21.1 km.
